Delivery & Payment
🚚
Delivery
Ksh 50 flat fee · Same-day within Serem
💳
Payment
Cash or M-PESA on delivery. No upfront!
🕐
Hours
Mon–Sun · 7am–8pm
📍
Location
Serem, Vihiga County, Kenya
Frequently Asked Questions
Browse the shop, add items to your cart, then tap Checkout. Fill in your name, phone number and delivery location. Pay via Pochi la Biashara to 0792 405 060, paste your M-Pesa SMS confirmation, then submit. Your order arrives via WhatsApp and our team confirms within minutes!
Delivery is a flat fee of Ksh 50 per order anywhere within Serem and surrounding Vihiga areas. Orders above Ksh 500 qualify for free delivery. We cover Serem, Vihiga Town, Luanda, Emuhaya, Hamisi, Sabatia, Kaimosi and neighbouring areas.
We accept M-Pesa via Pochi la Biashara (0792 405 060). Open M-Pesa → Lipa na M-Pesa → Pochi la Biashara → enter 0792405060. Copy the confirmation SMS and paste it in the order form. Cash on delivery is also accepted for repeat customers.
We offer same-day delivery all through the day. Place your order and our boda boda riders will deliver within 1–4 hours anywhere within a 5km radius of Serem centre. For urgent or large orders, call 0792 405 060.
Yes! All fresh produce is sourced daily from 50+ local Vihiga farmers, harvested the same morning. We never sell stale produce. If you're not 100% satisfied, we offer a full refund or replacement — just report within 24 hours via WhatsApp.
Mtumba is quality second-hand (pre-owned) clothing, shoes, bags and electronics. Every item is personally inspected, cleaned and graded: Grade A (Excellent / like new), Grade B (Good, minimal wear), Grade C (Fair condition). Only grades A and B are listed on Soko Huru.
Serem Market runs on Wednesdays & Saturdays. Other key days: Banja (Sun & Thu), Cheptulu (Tue & Fri), Chepsonoi (Mon & Fri), Kobujoi (Mon & Thu), Chavakali (Mon), Hamisi (Tue), Luanda & Mbale (Wed), Gisambai (Fri), Emuhaya & Kaimosi (Sat), Vihiga & Sabatia (Sun). Soko Huru is open every day regardless!
Yes. Contact us via WhatsApp within 24 hours of delivery if an item is not as described or arrives damaged. We arrange a replacement or refund at no extra cost. Fresh produce issues must be reported the same day of delivery with a photo.
Yes! We welcome local farmers, Mama Mboga vendors, Mtumba sellers, artisans and service providers. Our commission is 10–15% of each sale. Weekly M-Pesa payouts. WhatsApp us at 0792 405 060 to register your stall — it's free to join.
We currently deliver to Serem, Kaimosi, Vihiga Town, Luanda, Emuhaya, Hamisi, Sabatia, Chavakali, Mbale and Shamakhokho. Kaimosi University students get priority delivery. Expanding to Kakamega in 2026 — stay tuned!
No app download needed! Soko Huru works right in your browser. You can also install it as a PWA (tap "Install App" when prompted) for an app-like experience with offline browsing. Order via WhatsApp for the fastest response.
Prices are updated weekly based on KNBS market data, KAMIS reports and local Vihiga retail prices. Our prices are typically 10–15% lower than Nairobi prices for the same goods. Seasonal produce may vary. We always show live prices from verified sellers.

Smart Shopping · Vihiga County
💡 Soko Tips
Insider knowledge from our vendors and boda boda riders.
🚚
Same-Day Delivery All Through the Day
Order any time and our boda boda riders deliver same day — no cutoff times. Most deliveries arrive within 1–4 hours of placing your order.
🛵 Delivery Tip
🥬
Fresh Produce Peaks on Market Days
Vegetables are freshest on market days — Wed & Sat in Serem, Mon in Chavakali, Wed in Luanda. Order then for peak quality.
🌿 Freshness Tip
📱
WhatsApp Orders are Fastest
After adding items to cart, confirm via WhatsApp. Screenshot your cart and send it — our team responds within minutes.
💬 Order Tip
🥩
Kienyeji Chicken Sells Out Fast
Free-range kienyeji chicken is popular. Pre-order at least a day ahead, especially for weekends. Call 0792 405 060 to reserve.
🐓 Popular Item
💳
M-Pesa Before You Order
Pay via Pochi la Biashara to 0792 405 060 first, then paste your M-Pesa SMS in the order form. Speeds up dispatch by 30+ minutes.
💰 Payment Tip
👗
Mtumba: Best Deals Start of Month
New Mtumba bales arrive at the start of each month. Shop early for the best selection. Late month = picked-over stock.
🛍️ Mtumba Tip
🧮
Bundle Orders Save on Delivery
Group your household shopping into one order. Orders above Ksh 500 qualify for free delivery. Coordinate with neighbours!
💡 Savings Tip
📦
Track Your Boda Rider
Once confirmed, request the rider's number via WhatsApp. Most riders cover a 5km radius from Serem centre.
🏍️ Delivery Tip
Why Choose Us

The SOKO HURU Promise

🌿
Farm Fresh
Sourced directly from local Vihiga farmers, harvested at peak freshness every morning.
🚚
Door Delivery
We deliver to your home across Serem and surrounding areas within hours. Ksh 50 flat fee.
👗
Mtumba & Mali Mali
Quality second-hand clothing, shoes, bags and everyday household goods at unbeatable prices.
⭐
Trusted Quality
Every item is inspected before dispatch. We stand behind every product we deliver.

Soko Huru · Serem, Vihiga County

Built by Youth,
For Youth.

We grew up watching mama mbogas and mama kibandas hustle from dawn to dusk. We saw their struggle. We built a revolution.

Our Story
"Every time mama mboga spread her mat at 5 AM, every time mama kibanda lit her jiko before sunrise — we were watching. We grew up knowing their sacrifice. We grew up knowing their worth."
The Beginning

We Saw What Others Looked Past

Growing up in Serem, Vihiga County, we watched the women and men who fed our families struggle every single day. Mama mboga carrying heavy loads to market. Mama kibanda rising before the sun to prepare food. Farmers trekking kilometres to sell their harvest.

They worked harder than anyone. Yet they earned less, reached fewer customers, and remained invisible to the digital economy that was transforming Kenya around them.

We were young. We were students, graduates, hustlers ourselves. But we had one thing our community's traders didn't: we understood technology. And we had a question burning inside us — what if we used it for them?

The Realisation

Their Hustle Was Always Worthy of More

Serem Market had always been the heartbeat of our community — vibrant on Wednesdays and Saturdays, buzzing with life, color, and commerce. But trade was limited by who could physically show up, how far word could travel, and who had transport that day.

The products were excellent. The vendors were talented, knowledgeable, hardworking. The only thing missing was reach — a bridge between Serem's traders and the customers who needed them.

We realised: the market was not broken. It just wasn't free yet. Soko Huru — Free Market — was about to change that.

🥬
"Picture mama mboga at Serem Market. She's been there since dawn. She knows every vegetable by name, by taste, by season. She knows which family needs sukuma wiki and which one is looking for fresh terere. But by 2 PM, she's packing up unsold tomatoes. Not because the town doesn't need them — because the town doesn't know she's there."
— The Memory That Started Everything
The People We Built This For

Every stall. Every hustle. Every story.

🥬
Mama Mboga
The vegetable vendor who knows every leaf, every season, every family. Up at 4 AM so your table is full.
Now Online · 24/7
🍽️
Mama Kibanda
The food vendor who feeds the town. Her jiko never goes cold, her portions never disappoint.
Now in Your Pocket
🧑‍🌾
The Local Farmer
Tilling Vihiga's red earth to put food on tables across Kenya. No middlemen. Just honest produce.
Direct to Doorstep
The Movement

The SOKO
Revolution

This is not just a marketplace. This is a movement — a declaration that Serem's traders deserve the same digital tools as anyone in Nairobi. That Vihiga's economy deserves to be free.

01
Free the Market
No gatekeepers. No location barriers. Every trader in Vihiga County can now reach every customer — any time, any day, whether it's market day or not.
02
Honour the Hustle
Mama mboga's knowledge, mama kibanda's craft, the farmer's labour — these deserve recognition and reward. Soko Huru puts them at the centre, not the margin.
03
Youth Leading
We are young people from Serem, for Serem. We didn't wait for someone else to fix this. We built it ourselves — from the ground up, with our own hands and code.
"We watched our community hustle for decades. Now we've handed them a digital market. The revolution isn't coming — it's already here. And it started in Serem."
Our Identity

Built by Youth.
Powered by Community.

We are a generation that refused to accept that digital opportunity was only for big cities. We brought it home — to Serem, to Vihiga, to every mama mboga who deserves to be found.

🔥
Relentless
The same energy our traders put into every market day, we put into every line of code.
🌿
Rooted
We know Serem. We know Vihiga. This isn't outsider tech — it's built from the inside out.
🤝
Fair
No hidden fees. Fair commissions. Transparent prices. A market that works for everyone.
🚀
Ambitious
We started in Serem. But the revolution doesn't stop at Vihiga County borders.
Our Journey

From Vision to Revolution

The Idea
Growing Up Watching the Hustle
We grew up in Serem watching mama mbogas and mama kibandas work tirelessly. The seed was planted long before we had the tools to act on it.
The Build
Youth with a Mission and a Laptop
Young, determined, and equipped with technology, we began building what Serem Market had never seen — a digital stall for every trader, accessible via WhatsApp.
The Launch · 2026
Soko Huru Goes Live
Soko Huru launched in Serem, Vihiga County — 1,000+ products, 50+ local vendors, same-day delivery, M-Pesa payments. The market was finally free.
Now
The SOKO REVOLUTION Continues
Every order placed, every stall opened, every mama mboga who earns more — this is the revolution in action. And it's growing every single day.
2027 & Beyond
Expanding Across Western Kenya
Kakamega, Kisumu, Eldoret — the free market is coming to more communities. Because every hustler in Kenya deserves a digital home.
🌿

Our Mission

"To make quality food, fashion and essential goods accessible to every household in Vihiga County — through a fair, transparent, and free online marketplace built by and for our community."

50+
Vendors

We're Open

Get in Touch

Have questions? Want to sell on SOKO HURU? We'd love to hear from you. Our team is always happy to help.

✉️ info@sokohuru.co.ke
🕐 Mon–Sun, 7am–8pm
Our Foundation

SOKO HURU — Free Market

SOKO HURU means "Free Market" in Swahili. Born in Serem, Vihiga County, our story began with a bold vision — inspired by the rise of Boma Yangu, the government's landmark affordable housing programme transforming how Kenyans live, own, and thrive.

We saw that a new generation of homeowners and communities needed more than shelter — they needed a marketplace that could grow with them. SOKO HURU is powering the Boma Yangu ecosystem, bringing fresh produce, household essentials, Mtumba fashion and everyday goods directly to doorsteps across Vihiga County.

We connect local farmers, producers and traders directly with households — cutting out unnecessary middlemen and ensuring the freshest products at the fairest prices, every day.

Aligned with Kenya's Digital Future — SOKO HURU is part of Kenya's new generation of digital market infrastructure. In line with the government's drive to digitise services and build online market ecosystems for this generation, we are proud to be the online marketplace powering the Boma Yangu community in Serem and beyond.
Our Mission
"To make quality food, fashion and essential goods accessible to every household in Vihiga County through a fair, transparent, and convenient online marketplace."
📍
Based in
Serem, Vihiga

Soko Huru — Shop Freely, Live Fully 🌿
🍪
We use cookies to improve your experience
SOKO HURU uses cookies to remember your cart, preferences, and browsing activity to give you a faster, more personalised shopping experience. Manage preferences

🍪 Cookie Preferences

Choose which cookies you allow. Your preferences are saved for 365 days. You can change them any time from the footer.

Essential Cookies Required for the site to work — cart, checkout, session. Cannot be disabled.
Functional Cookies Remembers your name, phone, location and order history for faster checkout.
Analytics Cookies Tracks which products and categories you view so we can improve the site.
Personalisation Cookies Shows you products based on your browsing history and wishlist activity.

Install SOKO HURU
Shop offline, get faster load times & easy access from your home screen.
📵 Works Offline ⚡ Faster 📲 No App Store
🔔
Stay in the loop — enable notifications
Get morning breakfast deals at 7 AM, lunchtime specials at noon & instant alerts on new arrivals from SOKO HURU.
📲 Add to Home Screen
1
Open this page in Safari, then tap the ⎙ Share button at the bottom of your screen.
2
Scroll down the share sheet and tap "Add to Home Screen".
3
Tap "Add" in the top-right corner to confirm.

📲 Install SOKO HURU

To install this app:

Chrome / Edge Android: Tap the ⋮ menu → "Add to Home screen".

Samsung Internet: Tap ☰ → "Add page to" → "Home screen".

Firefox Android: Tap ⋮ → "Install" or "Add to Home screen".
